title: Empress Teta's Crown Jewels
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Teta|more=Jewel}}
[[File:EmpressTetasCrownJewels-Journal14.jpg|thumb|right|150px|[[Empress/Legends|Empress]] [[Teta/Legends|Teta]] in her Crown Jewels.]]
The '''Crown Jewels of [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]]''' were a collection of weapons, [[Armor/Legends|armor]] and jewelry worn by [[Teta/Legends|Teta]] during the [[Unification Wars (Koros)/Legends|Unification Wars]] and [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Hyperspace War]] of [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]].

[[File:Empress_Teta_symbol.png|thumb|left|100px|Symbol worn on Empress Teta's [[Armor/Legends|armor]] and on the hull of her [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] ships]]

The [[Emperor/Legends|empress]] wore a set of two fighting [[Knife/Legends|knives]] and [[battle armor]] even when not in battle because of the constant threat of [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]]. During the [[Political uprising of the Empress Teta system|coup]] which brought the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] into power, a loyalist of the old dynasty stole the artifacts and hid them in the system. Only a few of the Jewels were recovered by the Krath, but over the ensuing [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]], most of them had been discovered. As of [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], the Crown Jewels were considered a [[Wonders of the Galaxy/Legends|Wonder of the Galaxy]], and the only major missing pieces were Teta's knives. The [[Tetan monarchy/Legends|Tetan Royal Family]] offered a reward of 1 million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to anyone who could return the knives to them.
